meaning: n.(一批)随员,(一套)家具,套房,套,组,组曲
examples: I suggest we fit you up with an office suite.
We were entertained in the company's hospitality suite.
Malone got to his feet and followed his superior out of the suite.
The popular Loft Suite was the VIP Room for the Cauldron Nightclub, accessible via a hidden stairway.
The Windows 8 Gesture Suite enables a touchless version of all touchscreen gestures in the new operating system.
